notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
E006 cost-6 starter: copied from E005 access starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6.
E007 damage-cap starter: copied from E006 cost-6 starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6-damagecap.
turn-001: P1 opened by taking the northeast center and staging the guardian/marksman core toward the middle.
turn-002: P2 started the west-south flank and sent the second scout toward the southeast lane.
turn-003: P1 advanced the center group but banked supply instead of recruiting immediately.
turn-004: P2 widened the southern approach and also stayed below the first recruit threshold.
turn-005: P1 claimed center-north and recruited the first central marksman reinforcement.
turn-006: P2 completed the southeast flank, chipped P1s raider, and recruited a punish raider.
turn-007: P1 took the exact middle, bloodied the forward southern scout, and added a guardian.
turn-008: P2 took center-south and recruited support behind the flank.
turn-009: P1 collapsed onto the middle and killed the damaged southern scout.
turn-010: P2 flipped east and damaged P1s exposed center scout from a support marksman position.
turn-011: P1 killed P2s support marksman but had to spread east instead of staying compact.
turn-012: P2 killed P1s damaged raider and reloaded the west lane with a scout.
turn-013: P1 damaged the east scout, reclaimed the lane, and recruited a third marksman.
turn-014: P2 re-flipped west-south and sent the raider back into the center-south lane.
turn-015: P1 retook east and damaged the raider, but chose another guardian over a second recruit wave.
